title: TexTrue's Rubidium Options
description: Unofficial port of Reese's Sodium Options to work with Rubidium on MinecraftForge/NeoForge.
body: # TexTrue's Rubidium Options (TRO) ### **_If you are using [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium), you should go with [TexTrue's Embeddium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/textrues-embeddium-options)!_** TexTrue's Rubidium Options is an unofficial Forge port fork of FlashyReese's "[Reese's Sodium Options](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reeses-sodium-options)", made to work with FML. This mod has the same functionality as Reese's Sodium Options, but is for [Rubidium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rubidium) (Magnesium may also work, not tested, Not compatible with [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)). Support mc1.16.5 and above version! ## Known issues - Rubidium Extra cannot detect that this mod is installed, still popping up suggestions (Rubidium Extra version <1.16.5-0.4.8.28 / 1.18.2-0.4.9.26 / 1.19.2-0.4.7.27). - **TRO 1.0.1-mc1.20.1 and above only support Rubidium 0.7.x and above (1.0.0+XXHX only support rubidium 0.6.5)!** ### _**Don't report TRO's issues to the official Reese's Sodium Options Github.**_
